title: Wish You Were Here -50-
upgrade_suggestion: This is the definitive modern audio presentation of the album — Dolby Atmos and Quadraphonic mixes on Blu-ray represent formats unavailable on vinyl. No upgrade path exists within this format.
commentary:
Released in September 1975, *Wish You Were Here* followed the massive success of *The Dark Side of the Moon*. The album deals with themes of absence, the music business, and former band member Syd Barrett. The recording sessions were notoriously difficult, but the result is a deeply cohesive and emotional record that many band members consider their favorite.

**About this pressing:**
This is the 2025 50th Anniversary release. *Deadwax TBD — check runouts for mastering engineers or pressing plant symbols. Update this section once details are logged.*
